title: Who Is Viswas Raghavan, Citi's $52 Million Hire Days After JPMorgan Exit
summary_full: Viswas “Vis” Raghavan joined Citigroup in February 2024 as Head of Banking shortly after leaving JPMorgan.
summary_public: Viswas “Vis” Raghavan joined Citigroup in February 2024 as Head of Banking shortly after leaving JPMorgan.
